case_title: ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES VS. MELISSA SIDES et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES SERVED AUG-24-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIDES, MELISSA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF PERSONAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SIDES, MELISSA WALKER, JUSTIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIDES, MELISSA WALKER, JUSTIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET, APARTMENT #1913, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIDES, MELISSA WALKER, JUSTIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANTS VACATED THE PREMISES ON SEPT. 5, 2010, $1,644.76 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $455.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,524.76, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
